transcript: What is finance? Yeah, what is finance? Back to basics, huh? Okay, time me one minute. Businesses generally need money or capital to start, to grow, to diversify. The money that people save or invest can be used to finance businesses. Put simply, finance is connecting people with surplus money to people with ideas. But you don't just walk into Tata and give them your nest egg. Similarly, the Amul girl doesn't just come knocking on your door asking for cash. No, you need to go through an intermediary, someone in the financial services industry. An advisor can help you save or invest through a range of financial institutions like banks, insurance companies, mutual funds, alternative funds and non-banking financial institutions. Firms that help businesses raise the capital are called investment and merchant banks. And the place this exchange happens is called the market.
